---
description: Create a new bookmark — fork the current timeline
argument-hint: <name>
---

Run `oneiros bookmark create $ARGUMENTS` to create a new bookmark. This forks the active bookmark's canon into an independent timeline and switches to it.

Bookmarks are named timelines within a brain's canon. The default bookmark is "main". Creating a bookmark snapshots the current state — both timelines share history up to the fork point and diverge from there.
